'''Jerne City H.Q''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military base located on [[Jerne]]. It was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ryko Vant]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and once hosted the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] when he visited Jerne trying to hunt down [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].<ref name="dkd" />
